video_info.title: Indian Idol
video_info.shortDescription: Indian Idol 16 – “Yaadon Ki Playlist” celebrates music that brings back cherished memories and emotions. For the first time ever, auditions go outdoors, traveling across India to discover raw talent, hosted by the legendary Udit Narayan, while Aditya Narayan returns as the main host. The judges - Vishal Dadlani, Shreya Ghoshal, and Badshah - search for voices that touch hearts. A season where every song is a memory, and every melody tells a story.

The judges - Vishal Dadlani, Shreya Ghoshal, and Badshah - search for voices that touch hearts. A season where every song is a memory, and every melody tells a story.

video_info.title: Bundesliga 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Bayern Munich take on Union Berlin in Bundesliga Matchday 27 at the Allianz Arena. The hosts are strong favorites, but Union Berlin will aim to test their resilience with a spirited performance. Fans can expect a clash of attacking firepower against defensive grit. Find out who comes on top. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Bundesliga 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: FC Koln face Borussia Monchengladbach at RheinEnergieStadion in their Bundesliga clash. With Koln winless in their last five and Gladbach also struggling for consistency, both sides will be desperate to regain momentum. It sets the stage for a tightly contested derby where either team could seize the breakthrough. Find out who comes on top. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Bundesliga 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: VfL Wolfsburg host Werder Bremen in a matchup between two sides chasing stability after inconsistent spells, with Wolfsburg looking to rediscover their edge at home and Bremen eager to build momentum after mixed recent results. With both teams clustered in the mid‑table fight, this clash promises a tight, hard‑worked contest where small margins could decide the outcome. Find out who comes on top.
